title: mitrephora ochracea
intro: Mitrephora ochracea is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the yellow mitrephora. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Mitrephora ochracea include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Mitrephora ochracea is often prepared by making infusions or decoctions from its roots and leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications.
